widgets_values: The young OHWXPERSON female vocalist is passionately and intensely singing a dramatic power ballad into a large condenser microphone. Her expression shows deep, raw emotion, with her mouth wide open, her teeth visible, and visible muscle tension in her neck and jaw as she holds a high note. The background is a professional, moody recording studio with purple and blue light washing over grey acoustic foam. The mouth movements and jaw synchronisation are precise and realistic.

# LTXV-2 Model Files & Dependencies

## Diffusion Model
**ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf**  
*Place in:* `unet`

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/LTX-2.3-GGUF/blob/main/distilled/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-Q5_K_M.gguf)
